https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Social Media--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox-Gruppe: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox-Name: TheRealFoltyn

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Was ist Roblox? ROBLOX ist ein virtueller Online-Spielplatz und eine Werkstatt, in der Kinder jeden Alters sicher interagieren, kreativ sein, Spaß haben und lernen können. Das Besondere an ROBLOX ist, dass praktisch alles von Mitgliedern der Community entworfen und gebaut wird. ROBLOX ist zwar für 13- bis 18-Jährige gedacht, steht aber allen Altersgruppen offen. Jeder Spieler beginnt mit der Auswahl eines Avatars und gibt ihm eine Identität. Anschließend können sie ROBLOX erkunden und mit anderen chatten, Spiele spielen oder an kreativen Projekten zusammenarbeiten. Jeder Spieler erhält außerdem ein eigenes, unbebautes Grundstück sowie eine virtuelle Werkzeugkiste, mit der er alles Mögliche entwerfen und bauen kann – sei es ein begehbarer Wolkenkratzer, ein funktionierender Hubschrauber, ein riesiger Flipperautomat, ein Multiplayer-„Capture the Flag“-Spiel oder eine andere, noch nie dagewesene Kreation. Das erste virtuelle Grundstück ist kostenlos. Durch die Teilnahme und das Erstellen cooler Inhalte können ROBLOX-Mitglieder spezielle Abzeichen und ROBLOX-Dollar („Robux“) verdienen. Im Gegenzug können sie im Online-Katalog Avatar-Kleidung und -Accessoires sowie hochwertige Baumaterialien, interaktive Komponenten und funktionierende Mechanismen kaufen.

#Roblox #foltyn

uk.title: ROBLOX OBBY, АЛЕ ТИ ПРОКЛЯТИЙ..
uk.description:
Я спробував пройти оббі в Roblox, будучи проклятим, і це був хаос! Обов'язково перегляньте все відео, щоб дізнатися, що сталося.

Товар: https://foltyn.shop/

Приєднуйтесь до цього каналу, щоб отримати доступ до бонусів:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Соціальні мережі--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Група Roblox: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Ім'я Roblox: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Що таке Roblox? ROBLOX — це віртуальний онлайн-майстерня та майстерня, де діти різного віку можуть безпечно взаємодіяти, творити, розважатися та навчатися. Він унікальний тим, що практично все в ROBLOX розроблено та побудовано членами спільноти. ROBLOX розроблений для дітей віком від 13 до 18 років, але відкритий для людей будь-якого віку. Кожен гравець починає з вибору аватара та надання йому ідентичності. Потім вони можуть досліджувати ROBLOX — взаємодіяти з іншими через чат, ігри або співпрацювати над творчими проектами. Кожному гравцеві також надається власний шматок незабудованої нерухомості разом із віртуальним набором інструментів, за допомогою якого можна проектувати та будувати що завгодно — будь то хмарочос, яким можна керувати, робочий гелікоптер, гігантський пінбольний автомат, багатокористувацька гра «Захоплення прапора» чи якесь інше, ще не вигадане творіння. Ця перша ділянка віртуальної землі безкоштовна. Беручи участь та будуючи круті речі, учасники ROBLOX можуть заробляти спеціальні значки, а також долари ROBLOX («Robux»). У свою чергу, вони можуть купувати одяг та аксесуари для аватарів в онлайн-каталозі, а також преміальні будівельні матеріали, інтерактивні компоненти та робочі механізми.


#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: Lauv - I Like Me Better (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Lauv - I Like Me Better (Lyrics)

Stream & Download: https://lauv.lnk.to/me...

Lets Support & Follow Lauv:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/lauvsongs
Twitter: https://www.x.com/lauvsongs
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@lauvsongs
Instagram: https://www.unstagram.com/lauvsongs



#ILikeMeBetter #Lauv #Pop #Lyrics #TikTokHymn

Lyrics:
 Lauv 
"I Like Me Better"

To be young and in love in New York City
To not know who I am but still know that I'm good long as you're here with me
To be drunk and in love in New York City
Midnight into morning coffee
Burning through the hours talking

Damn

I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time
'Cause I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

I don't know what it is but I got that feeling
Waking up in this bed next to you, swear the room yeah it got no ceiling
If we lay, let the day just pass us by
I might get to too much talking
I might have to tell you something

Damn

I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time
'Cause I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

Stay awhile stay awhile
Stay here with me
Stay awhile stay awhile, oh
Stay awhile stay awhile
Stay here with me
Lay here with me
Yeah, yeah

I like me better when I'm with you
(Yes, I do, yes, I do, babe)
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time
'Cause I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

I like me, I like me
Look who you made me, made me, oh no
Better when

I like me better when I'm with you

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters REMATCH
snippet.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters REMATCH. You asked for it. This was absolutely INSANE.

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo:  @thesaintsofgames 
George:  @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap:  @Sapnap 
Antfrost:  @Antfrost 
awesamdude:  @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

24 teams enter.
Only the strongest survive. ⚔️


⸻

📅TOURNAMENT ROADMAP

🏆PLAYOFFS — MARCH 28 – MARCH 30

▪️24 Teams
▪️3 Groups (A, B & C)
▪️6 Matches Every Day

Top 16 teams from overall rankings advance to the Grand Finals.

👑
 GRAND FINALS — MARCH 31 – APRIL 01

▪️16 Teams
▪️2 Days
▪️6 Matches Every Day

⸻

🧭MATCH FORMAT

Each day features cross-group battles:

✅Match 1 — ERANGEL

✅Match 6 — MIRAMAR

snippet.title: Ganga Ke Kinare | Bunny | Sagar | Kripa Record
snippet.description:
Kripa Record Presents "Ganga Ke Kinare"

Singer - Bunny & Sagar
Music & Compose - Bunny 
Lyrics - Sagar 
Flute - Kiran Vinkar
Mix & Master - Hanish Taneja

Featuring - Dimpy Negi
Director - Alex
Creative Director & DOP - Arshad
Editor - Zipsi
Colourist - Onkar
VFX - Ronak Bindra and Aman Singh bhakuni 
BTS - Shubham rana 
Camera Assitant - Golu
Sagar & Bunny Makeup & Hair - Viren 
Dimpy makeup & Hair - Sonakshi & Isha 
Choreographer - Chinu
Foreigners Coordinator - Chinu & Vijay Rawat
Dimpy Costume - Nandini Fashion ( Lehnga )
Camera & Light- Y-Series Production Lights 
Gaffer - Sunil 
Drone - Shanky 

Special thanks - Parmarth Niketan Ashram

Team Kripa Record - Ankita

Digital Distribution - Universal Music
Project Head - Sahil Sharma 

Lyrics: 

Chaand ko niharu
Shiv Jo pukaru x2
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith ke…
Ganga ke kinaare 
baith ke 

Rooh ko sawaru 
Aarti utaaru
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke x2
Baith ke…. 

Hum toh hmare hi jeevan se hai itne 
Sataaye hue 
Toote hain bikhre hain hum toh 
Sabke bhulaye hue 

Kehte hain aaye jo 
Ganga nahaye 
Har jaate hain sab log 
Ab humne samjha hai 
Ab humne jana 
Kyu ganga aate hain log 

Thakk gaye the hum 
Dukhon ko utha ke 
Ab chain ayaaa 
Aayi ab saansain
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith ke …. X2 

Kyu roye har baat me bandeya 
Kya laya tha sath me bandeya 
Jaane de jo chala gaya hai 
Kuch bi nai tere hath me bandeya  

Man nahi bharta 
Jitna bi taakain
Itna sukoon hain 
Bhar gayi aankhain
Ganga ke kinaare bath ke…
 
Ganga dharaye shivaye Ganga dharaye 
Har har bole namah shivaye..

Reach us at: Kriparecordsindia@gmail.com

(c) Universal Music Group

► About Kripa Record:

"Kripa Record" is a devotional music label dedicated to producing and promoting spiritual music that inspires profound experiences. "Kripa" meaning "grace" in Sanskrit, reflects the essence of divine mercy in the label's music. Kripa’s diverse devotional music is crafted by renowned artists, invoking peace, reverence, and spiritual awakening. It will serve as a cherished companion for meditation, prayer, and reflection.

Sagar & Bunny Makeup & Hair - Viren 
Dimpy makeup & Hair - Sonakshi & Isha

Foreigners Coordinator - Chinu & Vijay Rawat
Dimpy Costume - Nandini Fashion ( Lehnga )

Gaffer - Sunil 
Drone - Shanky 

Special thanks - Parmarth Niketan Ashram

Team Kripa Record - Ankita

Digital Distribution - Universal Music
Project Head - Sahil Sharma 

Lyrics: 

Chaand ko niharu
Shiv Jo pukaru x2
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith ke…
Ganga ke kinaare 
baith ke 

Rooh ko sawaru 
Aarti utaaru
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke x2
Baith ke…. 

Hum toh hmare hi jeevan se hai itne 
Sataaye hue 
Toote hain bikhre hain hum toh 
Sabke bhulaye hue 

Kehte hain aaye jo 
Ganga nahaye 
Har jaate hain sab log 
Ab humne samjha hai 
Ab humne jana 
Kyu ganga aate hain log 

Thakk gaye the hum 
Dukhon ko utha ke 
Ab chain ayaaa 
Aayi ab saansain
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith ke …. X2 

Kyu roye har baat me bandeya 
Kya laya tha sath me bandeya 
Jaane de jo chala gaya hai 
Kuch bi nai tere hath me bandeya  

Man nahi bharta 
Jitna bi taakain
Itna sukoon hain 
Bhar gayi aankhain
Ganga ke kinaare bath ke…
 
Ganga dharaye shivaye Ganga dharaye 
Har har bole namah shivaye..

Reach us at: Kriparecordsindia@gmail.com

(c) Universal Music Group

► About Kripa Record:

"Kripa Record" is a devotional music label dedicated to producing and promoting spiritual music that inspires profound experiences. "Kripa" meaning "grace" in Sanskrit, reflects the essence of divine mercy in the label's music. Kripa’s diverse devotional music is crafted by renowned artists, invoking peace, reverence, and spiritual awakening. It will serve as a cherished companion for meditation, prayer, and reflection.

snippet.title: Ruth B. - Dandelions (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
🎵 Ruth B. - Dandelions (Lyrics)
🔔 Turn on notifications to stay updated with new uploads!

👉 Ruth B:
https://RuthB.lnk.to/followFI/facebook​​
https://RuthB.lnk.to/followII/instagram

👉 Follow Us:
https://www.lalmusicgroup.com
https://open.spotify.com/user/zugh1cc7qgq6q22gzhk6sv09q?si=250988ebe32e48a4  
https://www.instagram.com/lalmusicgroup  
https://www.tiktok.com/@lalmusicgroup 

🎤 Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
Maybe it's the way you say my name
Maybe it's the way you play your game
But it's so good, I've never known anybody like you
But it's so good, I've never dreamed of nobody like you

[Pre-Chorus]
And I've heard of a love that comes once in a lifetime
And I'm pretty sure that you are that love of mine

[Chorus]
'Cause I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Verse 2]
I think that you are the one for me
Cause it gets so hard to breathe
When you're looking at me
I've never felt so alive and free
When you're looking at me
I've never felt so happy

[Pre-Chorus]
And I've heard of a love that comes once in a lifetime
And I'm pretty sure that you are that love of mine

[Chorus]
Cause I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Bridge]
Dandelion into the wind you go
Won't you let my darling know?
Dandelion into the wind you go
Won't you let my darling know that

[Chorus]
I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Outro]
I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine

snippet.title: तीन बाण के धारी | छोटू सिंह रावना | Khatu shyam New bhajan | Teen baan ke Dhari | Chotu Singh Rawna
snippet.description:
तीन बाण के धारी | छोटू सिंह रावना | Khatu shyam New bhajan | Teen baan ke Dhari | Chotu Singh Rawna

तीन बाण के धारी बाबा श्याम की महिमा को समर्पित यह नवीन भजन,
छोटू सिंह रावना की मधुर आवाज़ में।
खाटू नरेश श्री श्याम बाबा, जो तीन बाण धारण करने वाले कलयुग के देवता हैं,
अपने भक्तों की हर पुकार सुनते हैं और कष्ट हर लेते हैं।
यह भजन श्रद्धा, भक्ति और आस्था से भरपूर है।
🙏 बाबा श्याम से प्रार्थना है कि यह भजन आप सभी के जीवन में सुख, शांति और कृपा लेकर आए।
जय श्री श्याम 🙏
अगर भजन पसंद आए तो

छोटू सिंह रावना की मधुर आवाज़ में।
खाटू नरेश श्री श्याम बाबा, जो तीन बाण धारण करने वाले कलयुग के देवता हैं,
अपने भक्तों की हर पुकार सुनते हैं और कष्ट हर लेते हैं।
यह भजन श्रद्धा, भक्ति और आस्था से भरपूर है।
🙏 बाबा श्याम से प्रार्थना है कि यह भजन आप सभी के जीवन में सुख, शांति और कृपा लेकर आए।
जय श्री श्याम 🙏
अगर भजन पसंद आए तो

snippet.title: Vaaste - 4K Video Song | Dhvani Bhanushali, Tanishk Bagchi | Bhushan K | RadhikaRao, Vinay S
snippet.description:
Vaaste - 4K Video Song | Dhvani Bhanushali, Tanishk Bagchi | Bhushan K | RadhikaRao, Vinay S
Vaaste Song: Dhvani Bhanushali, TanishkBagchi Nikhil D | Bhushan Kumar |RadhikaRao, Vinay Sapru

Song : Vaaste
Singers : Dhvani Bhanushali & Nikhil D’Souza
Music : Tanishk Bagchi 
Lyrics: Arafat Mehmood
Featuring: Siddharth Gupta and Anuj Saini
Music Label - T-Series 
Video By - Radhika Rao & Vinay Sapru
Songs Mixed & Mastered By Eric Pillai (Future Sound Of Bombay) 
Mix Assistant Engineers - Michael Edwin Pillai
Special Thanks to Azeem Dayani

Vaaste Lyrics
Vaaste Jaan Bhi Du
Main Gawah Emaan Bhi Du
Kismato Ka Likha Mod Du
Badle Mein Main Tere
Jo Khuda Khud Bhi De
Jannate Sach Kahu Chhod Du

Tumse Zaada Main Na Jaanu
Tumse Khud Ko Main Pehchanu
Tumko Bas Main Apna Maanu Mahiya

Vaaste Jaan Bhi Du
Main Gawah Emaan Bhi Du
Kismato Ka Likha Mod Du

Tere Alava Koi Bhi Khawish
Nahi Hai Baaki Dil Mein
Kadam Uthau Jaha Bhi Jaau
Tujhi Se Jaau Millne

Tere Liye Mera Safar
Tere Bina Main Jaau Kidhar

Tumse Zaada Main Na Jaanu
Tumse Khud Ko Main Pehchanu
Tumko Bas Main Apna Maanu Mahiya

Vaste Jaan Bhi Du
Main Gawah Emaan Bhi Du
Kismato Ka Likha Mod Du

Badle Mein Main Tere
Jo Khuda Khud Bhi De
Jannate Sach Kahu Chhod Du

Tu Hi Hai Sawera Mera
Tu Hi Kinara Mera
Tu Hi Hai Dariya Mera
Khuda Ka Jariya Mera
Tujhi Se Hota Shuru
Ye Mera Kaarwan
Tujhi Pe Jaake Khatam
Ye Mera Saara Jaha

Vaaste Jaan Bhi Du
Main Gawah Emaan Bhi Du
Kismato Ka Likha Mod Du
